economic_notes: Economic Development segment includes retail sales (gas bar and lounge operations). Gas bar revenue approximately $14.2M and lounge revenue approximately $15.6M included in Economic Development. Nation is economically dependent on ISC and Health Canada funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to insufficient audit evidence over Welamukotok Wellness controlled business enterprise (revenues $573,586, expenses $554,575, cost of sales $330,535, cash $43,860, inventory $136,290). Welamukotok Wellness is a consolidated subsidiary. Prior year accumulated surplus recalculated from opening balance $13,951,897 minus deficit $1,862,079 = $12,089,818 per statement. Long-term debt schedule shows $3,700,765 for 2024 but balance sheet shows $3,700,765 (read from note 12 totals). Annual debt service of $198,550 is repayment per cash flow statement. OSR includes retail sales of $27.4M (gas bar and lounge). Segment disclosure shows Child and Family Services under Social Services segment. Land claim liability of $19,521 outstanding since 1989 settlement.
